differential_diagnoses: Autoimmune encephalitis (e.g., anti-LGI1 or anti-NMDA receptor)
next_steps: Perform lumbar puncture for CSF analysis (cell count, protein, glucose, autoimmune encephalitis panel, paraneoplastic panel)
Serum autoimmune and paraneoplastic antibody testing
Repeat MRI of the brain with contrast to evaluate for inflammatory changes
Continuous video-EEG monitoring to distinguish between ictal/postictal states and nonepileptic manifestations
Consider whole-body PET/CT for underlying malignancy screening
Initiate empiric immunotherapy (e.g., high-dose corticosteroids or IVIG) if clinical suspicion remains high
Consult psychiatry for management of severe agitation and behavioral symptoms
